One-sentence description:
JavaScript rotates the hero subtitle periodically and populates the Bootstrap modal with project details 
Bootstrap is used for the responsive navbar, grid layout, cards, buttons, modal, and embed utilities.

HTML tags used (10):
1. nav
2. a
3. ul
4. li
5. main
6. header
7. section
8. article
9. figure
10. img

CSS properties used (5):
- background-color
- color
- font-family
- padding
- object-fit
